title: India's central bank warns of Iran war-fueled inflation, growth risks as it keeps policy rates steady
summary_full: India’s central bank needs to weigh growth risks and inflation pressures from the Iran war as higher energy costs and supply disruptions mount.
summary_public: India’s central bank needs to weigh growth risks and inflation pressures from the Iran war as higher energy costs and supply disruptions mount.
